phases.what_done: Preflight truth-check and mandatory bootloader/gate/evidence read completed.
phases.why: To anchor the task in strict truth and scope boundary before any writes.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Use GATE_ACK and preflight command outputs as admission evidence.
phases.limitation: No diagnostics generated in this phase.

phases.what_done: Created read-only analyzer tool with standard-library-only static heuristics.
phases.why: To map likely source-level blockers without runtime execution or optimization.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Compile the analyzer and inspect tool path plus code-level indicator coverage.
phases.limitation: Heuristics cannot assert exact root cause.

phases.what_done: Ran analyzer and generated source map/details/decision reports.
phases.why: To convert baseline blocker truth into evidence-weighted likelihood categories.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Check generated JSON/MD reports and strongest category ordering.
phases.limitation: Requires follow-up measurement tasks for precise attribution.

phases.what_done: Produced admin package: report, chronology, self-assessment, KPD, gate receipt, action card, roadmap next-step map.
phases.why: To preserve governance trace and owner-operational decision continuity.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Cross-check consistency across decision report, roadmap map, and action card.

phases.why: To satisfy report quality and scope purity gates before commit.
phases.limitation: Validation does not improve performance; it verifies truth discipline.

phases.what_done: Review diff/status, commit, push, and local/remote sync verification.
phases.why: To close task as auditable delivery unit.
phases.how_to_use_verify: Use commit hash and remote-sync check.
phases.limitation: Dependent on clean validation in prior phase.
